touches.ai_summary: Initial outbound email to Luke Flores introducing our platform's pipeline visibility capabilities. Luke responded positively, expressing interest in learning more about how we help sales teams gain real-time forecast accuracy.

Qualification call with Luke Flores to understand MatrixApps' current pipeline management challenges. Luke described frustrations with their current manual forecasting process and lack of visibility into deal health across their 35-person sales team. Confirmed budget authority and timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for tracking pipeline health?
questions_asked.answer: We're using spreadsheets and our CRM's basic reports, but nothing gives us predictive insights

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for a team your size

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: Our board wants better forecast accuracy - we've missed our quarterly targets twice this year

next_steps: Deep dive discovery call next week
Luke to gather current pipeline metrics

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call to review MatrixApps' pipeline data and confirm use case fit. Luke shared that their current forecast error rate is around 25%, which is creating tension with exec leadership. Discussed team composition and confirmed 35 seats needed.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to bring in Tariq Santos, our CRO, and probably IT for technical review

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with our CRM platform?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader context

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Luke to map out MatrixApps' sales process and identify specific pain points. Luke walked through their current quarterly planning cycle and explained how lack of early warning signals causes last-minute scrambles. Discussed success metrics and ROI expectations.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like 6 months after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Forecast accuracy above 90% and reps spending less time on admin work

questions_asked.question: What's your current tool stack for sales operations?
questions_asked.answer: Salesforce, Gong for call recording, and some custom dashboards

questions_asked.question: Can you help us identify which deals are at risk before they slip?
questions_asked.answer: That's exactly what our AI scoring engine does - flags risk signals in real-time

next_steps: Extended discovery session to map technical requirements

touches.ai_summary: Extended discovery session diving deep into MatrixApps' technical environment and integration requirements. Luke brought detailed questions about data security, user permissions, and reporting capabilities. Discussed their quarterly business review process and how our analytics could support it.

questions_asked.question: How does your AI model handle our custom fields and sales stages?
questions_asked.answer: We map your existing fields during implementation and train the model on your historical data

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy for call recordings?
questions_asked.answer: We keep them for 12 months by default

questions_asked.question: Can individual reps see their own deal scores without seeing the whole team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have role-based permissions that can be configured however you need

questions_asked.question: Who would be the main admin once this is set up?
questions_asked.answer: Probably someone from my team initially, then we might hand it to IT

objections: Concerned about change management with the sales team
next_steps: Introduce IT team for technical evaluation

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery insights and sharing case study from similar SaaS company that improved forecast accuracy by 32%. Luke confirmed demo date and mentioned he's briefing Tariq this week on the evaluation.

questions_asked.question: Can you send the security documentation ahead of the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, sending SOC 2 report and security overview now

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Luke Flores walking through core pipeline visibility features, AI deal scoring, and forecasting analytics. Luke was particularly engaged with the risk signal detection and asked detailed questions about customization. Showed examples using MatrixApps' actual deal stages and terminology.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize which signals trigger risk flags?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, you can set thresholds and add custom signals based on your business

questions_asked.question: What specific reports would you want to see in your Monday pipeline reviews?
questions_asked.answer: Deal health by rep, week-over-week movement, and early warning dashboard

questions_asked.question: How does the AI learn from our wins and losses?
questions_asked.answer: It continuously trains on your outcome data and adapts to your sales patterns

questions_asked.question: Can we test this with a subset of deals first?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, we can do a phased rollout

objections: Want to understand ongoing maintenance requirements
next_steps: Luke to schedule executive review with Tariq

touches.ai_summary: Demo follow-up email with recording link and answers to technical questions raised during demo. Luke confirmed he's moving forward with IT evaluation and executive review. Mentioned timeline is tight due to Q2 planning cycle.
next_steps: Technical eval scheduled with Leila Scott

touches.ai_summary: Email checking in on technical evaluation prep and confirming Leila Scott's availability. Luke mentioned the original time needs to be rescheduled due to a conflict on Leila's end.

Technical evaluation call with Leila Scott from IT, rescheduled from previous week. Leila conducted deep dive on data security, API architecture, and integration requirements. Discussed SSO setup, data encryption, and compliance requirements. Leila was thorough but neutral, focused on risk assessment.

questions_asked.question: What data do you sync from our CRM and how often?
questions_asked.answer: We sync deal, contact, and activity data in real-time via API

questions_asked.question: How do you handle PII and data privacy?
questions_asked.answer: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit, with field-level controls for sensitive information

questions_asked.question: What's your typical security review timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually takes us 1-2 weeks to complete technical due diligence

questions_asked.question: Do you support SSO with Okta?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we support all major SSO providers including Okta

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Luke to review pricing for 35 seats with automations plus consulting package. Luke confirmed budget is approved and walked through procurement process. Discussed implementation timeline and support options.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the consulting package?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM, custom playbook development, and quarterly business reviews

questions_asked.question: What's your procurement cycle typically look like?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks once we have exec and IT sign-off

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Tariq Santos and Luke Flores to align on business case and strategic value. Tariq focused on ROI, asking pointed questions about forecast accuracy improvements and team adoption. Discussed how this fits into MatrixApps' broader revenue operations strategy.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical ROI timeline for customers like us?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see measurable forecast improvement within 60 days

questions_asked.question: How do you ensure our reps actually use this versus it becoming shelfware?
questions_asked.answer: We build adoption into the implementation plan with training and change management support

questions_asked.question: What would make this a strategic win for you this quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Hitting our Q2 forecast number and having a scalable system as we grow the team

next_steps: Tariq to review proposal with finance

touches.ai_summary: Email follow-up on proposal status. Luke mentioned they're reviewing contract terms and have some questions about the discount structure and payment terms. Finance is involved now.

questions_asked.question: Can we break the payment into quarterly installments?
questions_asked.answer: We typically do annual prepay, but can discuss terms

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Luke to discuss contract terms and pricing adjustments. Luke requested quarterly payment terms and asked about discount options for multi-year commitment. Discussed implementation start date and resource requirements.

questions_asked.question: What discount can you offer for a 2-year commitment?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer 12% discount for 2-year prepay or 8% for annual

questions_asked.question: Can we add seats mid-contract if we grow the team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, you can add seats anytime at prorated pricing

questions_asked.question: What's your target close date?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally by end of month to start implementation in Q2

objections: Payment terms don't align with their budget cycle
next_steps: Revise proposal with payment term options

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment call with Tariq Santos to finalize terms and get his sign-off. Tariq confirmed budget approval but wanted to understand implementation risk and support commitments. Discussed success metrics and accountability.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we don't see the forecast improvement you're projecting?
questions_asked.answer: We have a 90-day success guarantee and will work with you to optimize until you do

questions_asked.question: Is there anything blocking you from moving forward this month?
questions_asked.answer: Just need to finalize payment terms with finance and we're ready

next_steps: Send revised contract with quarterly payment option
Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Final executive meeting with Tariq Santos, rescheduled from earlier in the week. Tariq reviewed the final contract terms and confirmed MatrixApps' commitment. Discussed kickoff timeline and implementation plan. Tariq asked about customer success support and escalation process.

questions_asked.question: Who will be our main point of contact during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: You'll have a dedicated implementation manager and ongoing CSM

questions_asked.question: Are we ready to move to contract signature?

next_steps: Luke to coordinate internal rollout plan
